description_long: This object is a standard skateboard featuring a flat, elongated wooden deck with rounded ends and a black grip tape surface on top. The deck is mounted on two metal trucks, each holding a pair of small, round wheels with visible orange cores. The wheels are positioned symmetrically beneath the deck, allowing for smooth rolling and maneuverability. The grip tape covers the entire upper surface, providing a textured, non-slip area for the rider's feet. The underside of the deck is not visible, but the construction suggests a typical multi-ply wood laminate. The overall design is utilitarian and minimal, with no visible graphics or branding on the deck or wheels.
description: A classic skateboard with a black grip tape deck, orange-cored wheels, and metal trucks. The design is minimal and functional, with no visible graphics or logos.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the skateboard, black grip tape on top, and both sets of orange-cored wheels and trucks visible.
description_view_1: End view showing the rounded nose of the skateboard and the width of the black grip tape deck.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, nearly identical to view 0, displaying the skateboard's length, wheels, and trucks.
description_view_3: End view from the tail, similar to view 1, showing the rounded end and width of the deck.
attribute_wheel_type: street, small size, orange core, no visible text or logos
attribute_truck_style: standard, silver color, top-mount, no visible branding or unique features
attribute_grip_tape_pattern: solid black, no visible pattern, graphics, or text
